info.title: Microsoft.DotNet.Interactive.App
info.description: Command line tool for interactive programming with C#, F#, PowerShell, and more. Powers Polyglot Notebooks and provides .NET support for Jupyter.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

options.name: --log-path
options.description: Enable file logging to the specified directory

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Enable verbose logging to the console [default: False]

commands.name: jupyter
commands.description: Starts dotnet-interactive as a Jupyter kernel

options.name: --default-kernel
options.description: The default language for the kernel [default: csharp]

options.name: --http-local-only
options.description: Exposes ports only on local network interfaces [default: False]

options.name: --http-port-range
options.description: Specifies the range of ports to use to enable HTTP services [default: 2048-3000]

arguments.name: connection-file
arguments.description: The path to a connection file provided by Jupyter

options.name: --http-port-range
options.description: Specifies the range of ports to use to enable HTTP services [default: 2048-3000]

options.name: --path
options.description: Installs the kernel specs to the specified directory

commands.name: stdio
commands.description: Starts dotnet-interactive with kernel functionality exposed over standard I/O

options.name: --default-kernel
options.description: The default language for the kernel [default: csharp]

options.name: --http-port-range
options.description: Specifies the range of ports to use to enable HTTP services

options.name: --http-port
options.description: Specifies the port on which to enable HTTP services

options.name: --kernel-host
options.description: Name of the kernel host. [default: kernel://pid-4234/]

options.name: --working-dir
options.description: Working directory to which to change after launching the kernel. [default: <path>]

commands.name: notebook-parser
commands.description: Starts a process to parse and serialize notebooks.
